evals.name: default-overview
evals.expected_output: L1 overview: progress bar + suggested next step + sync summary. Output ≤3 lines. Natural language, no exposed IDs.

assertions.text: Output is ≤3 lines (L1 overview format)
Output includes progress indicator or summary
Output includes suggested next step
No internal IDs (CR-xxx, PF-xxx) exposed in output
Read-only operation, no files modified
Only overview procedure file loaded (lazy loading)

evals.name: detail-view
evals.expected_output: L2 breadth view: feature tree format with status markers for each PF. Expands beyond the 3-line default.

assertions.text: Output shows feature tree with per-PF status
Output is more detailed than default (>3 lines)
No internal IDs exposed in output
Read-only operation, no files modified
Only detail procedure file loaded

evals.name: tree-full-view
evals.expected_output: L3 full value chain: complete BR→PF→CR hierarchy tree with status markers.

assertions.text: Output shows complete value chain hierarchy (BR→PF→CR levels)
Tree includes status markers for each node
No internal IDs exposed in natural language parts
Read-only operation, no files modified

evals.name: since-time-filter
evals.expected_output: Shows changes in the last 3 days, combining time filter with overview format.

assertions.text: Output scoped to last 3 days of changes
Includes CR state transitions within the time window
Output uses natural language
Read-only operation

evals.name: role-specific-view
evals.expected_output: PM-perspective view: emphasizes delivery timelines, scope completion, iteration progress over technical details.

assertions.text: Output adapts to PM perspective (delivery-focused)
Output de-emphasizes technical implementation details
Emphasizes scope completion and progress metrics
Read-only operation

evals.name: keyword-search
evals.expected_output: Searches for '认证' across PF/CR names and descriptions. Shows matching items with their status.

assertions.text: Searches project data for '认证' keyword
Shows matching PFs/CRs with their current status
Provides fallback guidance if no match found
Read-only operation

evals.name: metrics-snapshot
evals.expected_output: Real-time metric snapshot with trend arrows. Shows quality/delivery/risk metrics.

assertions.text: Output includes metric categories (quality, delivery, risk)
Metrics include trend indicators
Read-only operation

evals.name: uninitialized-project
evals.expected_output: No .devpace/ directory. Gracefully handles missing state, suggests /pace-init.

assertions.text: Detects missing .devpace/ directory gracefully (no error)
Suggests running /pace-init to initialize
Does not create any files
Output is helpful, not an error message
